message:
fix(algorithms): correct group betweenness centrality and second-order centrality

Group betweenness centrality:
- Replace backwards BFS path-counting with sigma/sigma_no_c forward
  propagation to correctly compute the fraction of shortest paths passing
  through the group, matching the NetworkX definition.
- Skip source/target nodes that belong to the group.
- Normalize by (n-c)*(n-c-1) instead of total path count.

Second-order centrality:
- Switch from plain adjacency-based random walk to Metropolis-Hastings
  random walk (self-loops proportional to d_max - deg), which guarantees
  a uniform stationary distribution.
- Replace power-iteration eigenvector computation with the known
  pi = 1/n uniform vector.
- Simplify SOC formula to sqrt(2*n^2*Z_ii - n*(n+1)).

Degree mixing dict:
- Always record both (du,dv) and (dv,du) for every edge, removing the
  incorrect du != dv guard that under-counted symmetric entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
